title: COHR or APP: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors looking for stocks in the Technology Services sector might want to consider either Coherent (COHR) or AppLovin (APP). But which of these two companies is the best option for those looking for undervalued stocks?

title: AppLovin to Announce Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: PALO ALTO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ: APP) (“AppLovin” or the “Company”), the leading marketing platform, today announced it will report financial results for the second quarter of 2023 on Wednesday, August 9, 2023 after the U.S. stock market closes. An accompanying webinar will take place at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET on August 9, 2023 during which management will discuss quarterly results, as well as provide commentary on business performance. The webinar will be host.
